channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Red ringway sign left by contractors near 23/25 Brookway road, 3rd June
item.description:
Sign left since I think January 2026 Outside 23/25 Brookway road, GL53 8HF. What3words is oven.towns.mash Thanks!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43a, Cirencester Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Damaged tree parts falling on the public footpath, 3rd June
item.description:
10 metres from 31 Honeybourne Drive Cheltenham GL510QJ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Honeybourne Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Road closure signs and barriers blocking the road on the B4634., 3rd June
item.description:
Road closure signs and barriers blocking Old Gloucester Road B4634 from the House In The Tree pub towards Cheltenham saying the road is closed and no through traffic. There is no mention of this on any websites and no notifications that they are there until you hit them. The road is still open and you can get through. The signs are causing a big problem with people turning around in the road blocking traffic heading towards the house in the tree and from Withybridge Lane. They gave been there for two days now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Vehicle has been dumped here in the night a couple of nights ago, 3rd June
item.description:
The vehicle is smashed up and undrivable. The front and rear windscreen is smashed to smithereens. The vehicle is not a regular vehicle round here. Have logged with DVLA and Guinness partnership aswell.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Walk, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous connected potholes, edge of tarmac breaking away., 3rd June
item.description:
Halfway to the golf course clubhouse car park. This section of road has been deteriorating for several weeks now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickfield Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Water running down from Headlands as per pin on map down to The Mill, water is running constantly
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scheduled street clean unsatisfactory, 3rd June
item.description:
Street not cleaned and basements at risk of flooding from blocked road drains

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, St Lukes Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Large amount of tree branch fallen onto public footpath, 3rd June
item.description:
10 metres from 31 Honeybourne Drive Cheltenham GL510QJ Was programmed to be re-pollarded by end March this year but wasn't carried out Ref number 11498269

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Honeybourne Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Dead branch over pavement and road, 3rd June
item.description:
Danger to pedestrian and motorist

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, St Lukes Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain gulley beneath pavement is blocked., 3rd June
item.description:
Drain under pavement at 20 Albert Street GL50 4HS is filled with mud to the extent that my downpipe is beginning to fill with rubble from bottom up. Photo shows rubble shaken loose from down pipe when kicked loose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Larput Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw hedge Needs cutting back Approx 25 mtrs length Bus stop to cut through 2 way lights (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 3rd June
item.description:
PERM - Could you please raise a perm repair for the ARBS team. Road has been closed due to a falling tree, and a tree needs removing.Job 6700730

item.title: Eroded road surface/holes, 3rd June
item.description:
This issue was “fixed” last year but was a poor job then and is far worse now. The road is at its lowest point here and floods. Patching won’t solve this problem. Drainage and resurfacing is needed ///savers.installs.dressy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colesbourne, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Passing place potholes causing car damage, 3rd June
item.description:
The single track road from the A435 heading south and prior to the bridge over the river Churn What three words: ///aura.masks.triads

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colesbourne, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
